basic_details.job_title: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) Recruitment 2026: Footwear Design & Development Institute has released the official notification for 3 Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Up to 35 years (as per vacancy detail attached)
age_limit.details: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design: Up to 35 years Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessaries Design: Up to 35 years Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessaries Design: Up to 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Graduate, Diploma, PG (as per post)
qualification.details: Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff: Qualifications, experience, and age criteria as per Recruitment Rules for the respective positions. Merit, practical teaching ability, presentation, and communication skills will be given due importance. Candidates from SC/ST/OBC/EWS and differently-abled categories can apply. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design: Essential 8th Pass, Desirable 10th Pass. Candidates must be practically sound in machine operation, Garment/Apparel pattern making, sample making, and demonstration to students. Must be responsible for documentation, record keeping, and upkeep of the department. Should be able to operate/sew garments and repair sewing machines. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessaries Design: 12th Pass or above. Experience in Leather Garment pattern making, sample making, and demonstration to students. Must be responsible for documentation, record keeping, and upkeep of the department. Minimum 1 year in working in Leather Garments Pattern Making & Construction. Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessaries Design: Master Degree of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation or PG Diploma of minimum 2 years duration after graduation in Design / Leather Design / Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design / Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University/Institute. OR Master's Degree of minimum 02 years duration or PG Diploma (of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation) in any field from a recognized University or institute and Bachelor Degree of Diploma (of minimum 03 years duration) in Design / Leather Design / Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design / Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute. Academic and/or Industry Experience of at least 3 years in the field of Leather Garments. Academic experience if any should be of teaching in UG Degree or higher academic courses.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design
Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessaries Design
Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessaries Design

salary_details.pay_scale: Junior Faculty: Rs. 50,000/- per month. Academic Support Cadre staff: Rs. 30000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Junior Faculty: Rs. 50,000/- per month Academic Support Cadre staff (e.g., Lab assistant): Rs. 30000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FDDI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the FDDI Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff posts is 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff positions at FDDI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Junior Faculty at FDDI?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Faculty position at FDDI is Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design is 8th Pass, with 10th Pass being desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the advertised posts is up to 35 years, as per the vacancy details attached.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff positions at FDDI will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this FDDI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for FDDI Recruitment 2026 is entirely online.
